title: ChangeForge Hook Telemetry Event
description: One JSONL record appended by a ChangeForge hook to the user cache. Telemetry is a runtime fact log for offline review. It must never contain prompts, environment variables, secrets, full command arguments, or command output.

repo_hash.description: SHA-256 prefix of the resolved repository root. Never the absolute path.

cwd_hash.description: SHA-256 prefix of the resolved working directory. Never the absolute path.

event_name.description: Hook event such as PostToolUse or Stop.

session_id.description: Session or turn identifier, or a repo+date fallback. Never a prompt.

command_program.description: Only the leading executable name of an observed command, truncated. Never full arguments.

changed_path_risk_surfaces.description: Risk surfaces matched from changed file paths only.

command_risk_surfaces.description: Risk surfaces matched from a command string only. The full command is never recorded.

closure_risk_surfaces.description: Risk surfaces counted as closure-relevant engineering work. Read-only command matches are intentionally excluded.

validation_command_detected.description: Whether a validation-looking command was observed earlier in the turn. This is not validation evidence without an outcome in the stop closure.

validation_result_outcome.description: Broker-parsed outcome from bounded closure evidence.

completion_language_detected.description: Whether the final handoff text used success-implying completion language. Presence detection only.

repository_context_seen.description: Presence-only signal that repository context evidence was detected in closure.

workflow_state_seen.description: Presence-only signal that workflow state evidence was detected in closure.

tool_permission_sandbox_seen.description: Presence-only signal that tool permission/sandbox evidence was detected in closure.

skill_efficacy_benchmark_seen.description: Presence-only signal that skill-efficacy benchmark evidence was detected in closure.

plan_execution_consistency_seen.description: Presence-only signal that plan-execution consistency evidence was detected in closure.

validation_freshness_seen.description: Presence-only signal that validation freshness evidence was detected in closure.

implementation_preflight_complete.description: Whether a required implementation preflight manifest was present and satisfied the fields required for the observed edit. implementation_preflight_seen only means the manifest was present.
